crime.value: Kidnapping and sexual assault of teenage girl Gina by six men at a party
crime.quote: they took her to a cave and tied her up and raped her

victim.value: Gina, a 15-year-old popular girl with a secret about how she gets straight A's, making her vulnerable
victim.quote: one thing nobody knew about Gina she did what she had to do to get them straight A's

culprit_and_motive.value: Six men at Carly's party, motive appears to be sexual assault and control
culprit_and_motive.quote: the 6 guys went inside of the house and got a flash light

suspect_architecture.value: Six male perpetrators - group crime with shared means (physical force), motive (sexual assault), and opportunity (isolated victim)
suspect_architecture.quote: the 6 guys went inside of the house and got a flash light and put on some different shoes

red_herring.value: Initial suggestion that Gina simply 'fell and couldn't get up' as explanation for her disappearance
red_herring.quote: They said she had fallen and couldn't get up

social_world.value: High school social hierarchy with distinct cliques - popular kids, geeks, gangstas, etc. Gina's status tied to boyfriend's football success
social_world.quote: their were the cliques. The first clique was Jazz Band, then you had the geeks, then you had the wanna be gangstas

alibi.value: The six perpetrators provide false explanation that Gina had fallen and couldn't get up to cover their crime
alibi.quote: They said she had fallen and couldn't get up

reveal_mechanic.value: Gina's confession to Johnny about the rape and pregnancy serves as the revelation of what actually happened
reveal_mechanic.quote: your friends raped me and they didn't stop... the baby isn't yours either

media_and_audience.value: Mother's public plea for information about missing daughter, creating community awareness and police involvement
media_and_audience.quote: So if anybody finds out what had happen to my baby girl please let me know im scared for her

investigator_wound.value: Johnny's betrayal by his own friends and the violation of his girlfriend creates deep personal trauma and relationship destruction
investigator_wound.quote: i need to be alone so don't text me and don't talk to me i will when i get over the issue I'm having

_meta.title: ebook anastasia timmons the girl who disappeared
